name: ruby-colorize
title: ruby-colorize
summary: color methods to Ruby String class
description:
color methods to Ruby String class
This Ruby extension adds methods to the String Class to set text color,
background color and text effects on the console and command line output.
It is using ANSI escape sequences.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-colorize because color methods to Ruby String class.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-colorize as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-colorize with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-colorize --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
